scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,worker,queue -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm:dev -w apps/server" "npm:dev -w apps/web" "npm:dev -w apps/worker" "npm:dev -w apps/queue"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/server && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
